---
title: "Dr. Leonardo Capitani"
toc: false
image: Leonardo_SYKE.JPG
about: 
 template: trestles
 image-shape: round
 image-width: 20em
 links:
    - text: Twitter
      href: https://twitter.com/LeoCapitani7
    - text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/leomarameo7
    - text: Email
      href: mailto:leocapi07@gmail.com
---

This is a Quarto website.

To learn more about Quarto websites visit <https://quarto.org/docs/websites>.

git push -u origin main

```{r}
1 + 1


```
